title: [SV] Add Builder for Twine to VeratimOp
body:
Add a builder to `sv::VerbatimOp` that accepts a Twine argument. This will make it a lot easier to construct strings that need to be passed in without having to do an explicit conversion to a string beforehand.

This was suggested by @youngar in https://github.com/llvm/circt/pull/1170/files#r649805728 (h/t).
